StaffId.description: The ID of the staff member who earned commissions.

SaleDateTime.description: The date and time when the sale occurred.

SaleType.description: The Sales type. When this is "Purchase" indicates that this sale paid commission to a staff. When this is "Return"

ProductId.description: The product ID of the item for which the staff earned commissions.

EarningsDetails.description: Contains information about which commissions the staff earned for this item.

Earnings.description: The total commissions earned by the staff for this item.
